name: Hershey Bar Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Break a Hershey's milk chocolate bar (7 oz) into pieces.
2. Melt the chocolate pieces with 1/3 cup of milk in a double boiler, stirring frequently until smooth.
3. Add 1 1/2 cups of miniature marshmallows or 15 large marshmallows to the melted chocolate mixture and stir until melted.
4. Remove from heat and allow to cool to room temperature.
5. In a small bowl, beat whipping cream until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the whipped cream into the chocolate mixture.
7. Spoon the filling into the prepared pie crust.
8. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until firm, about 4 hours.
9. Garnish with whipped cream or cherry pie filling, if desired.
10. Serve chilled.
Chocolate Petal Crust:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease a 9-inch pie plate.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the butter, sugar, egg, and vanilla extract until light and fluffy.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until just combined.
6. Shape the dough into two rolls about 1-1/2 inches in diameter.
7. Cut one roll into 1/8-inch slices and arrange them on the bottom and up side of the prepared pie plate, pressing the edges together.
8. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until set.
9. Allow to cool completely before assembling the pie.
Note: The remaining dough can be stored in the freezer for later use.
